_doc: Curated map of bridge-function return shapes for the variable-type tracker in bridge_preflight.py. Drives 'attribute confusion' warnings (e.g. agent does paths[0].asset_class_path but paths[0] is a str). Two parts: function_returns (per-function shape) and type_attributes (valid attrs per UE type). Add entries based on audit-log failure patterns — keep narrow, not exhaustive.

str._note: str is a Python string. NO UE-object attributes are valid. Any .x access is wrong unless x is a builtin string method (split, strip, startswith, ...). Such builtins are ignored by the detector.

SoftObjectPath._note: UE FSoftObjectPath. Direct attrs are LIMITED — to read the path string use sp.export_text() (returns the full /Game/...PathName) or sp.to_tuple()[0]. The USTRUCT fields (asset_path_string / asset_name / package_name / sub_path_string) are NOT accessible as direct attributes — you must go through sp.get_editor_property('asset_path_string'). Common confusion: agent thinks it has AssetData fields like asset_class_path.

AssetData._note: UE FAssetData (returned by asset registry, not by bridge in most cases).
